summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OCB AI TITAN ERP - Accounting, Reports, Settings, Serial Number, and Product Assembly modules. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all requested features.
seed_data_creation: Not needed - existing test data used (18 accounts, 4 journals, 6 serial numbers, 1 assembly formula)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major ERP modules tested. Backend APIs: 22 tests covering Auth, Chart of Accounts CRUD, Journal Entries, Financial Reports (Trial Balance, Balance Sheet, Income Statement), Reports (9 types), Backup, Serial Numbers, Product Assembly. Frontend routes: /accounting/chart-of-accounts, /accounting/journals, /reports (9 tabs), /settings/backup, /settings/printer, /inventory/serial-numbers, /inventory/assemblies. Note: Product Assembly uses route /inventory/assemblies not /inventory/product-assembly.

features_verified.login_flow: PASS - Login with owner credentials works
features_verified.chart_of_accounts: PASS - View (18 accounts), Create, Update, Delete all working

financial_reports.trial_balance: PASS - Shows items with debit/credit totals
financial_reports.income_statement: PASS - Shows revenues, expenses, net income

features_verified.reports_page: PASS - All 9 tabs working (Penjualan, Produk, Terlaris, Stok, Cabang, Kasir, Pelanggan, Hutang, Piutang)
features_verified.settings_backup: PASS - Backup list and create working
features_verified.settings_print_struk: PASS - Printer configuration and receipt template UI working
features_verified.serial_numbers: PASS - 6 serial numbers displayed with status tracking
features_verified.product_assembly: PASS - 1 formula displayed with Rakit/Bongkar functionality
